meaning: adj.四倍的,四重的adv.四倍,四重
examples: Beef production has fallen nearly fourfold.
THE amount of plastic thrown away by Americans increased fourfold between 1980 and 2008.
One example is the fourfold increase in alcohol-related deaths that occurred between 1991 and 2002.
In contrast, stock investments since 1980 have increased their purchasing power more than fourfold.
In the most recent quarter, net income rose by more than fourfold from the year-earlier period.
